title: FEQO 36 Pcs Eucalyptus Stems Artificial Eucalyptus Leaves 15 Inch Faux Eucalyptuses Branches for Wedding Bouquet Home Decor, Gold
features: Appropriate size: come with 36 branches artificial eucalyptus leaves, the length of each branch is about 15inch/38cm, you can cut or bend the eucalyptus branches to meet your various demands

Premium material: FEQO artificial eucalyptus leaves are made of high quality plastic, and an elastic wire is added to the stems, which is flexible and make it easy to match the other flowers and branches
Durable and reusable: these artificial eucalyptus leaves will never wither, and it is easy to care and clean, a great decoration all through the year

Versatile eucalyptus stems: not only go with various artificial flowers or stems, these faux eucalyptus stems also can be used to fill the vase on their own, pretty and vivid, a good decoration for your home and parties

Widely use: These artificial eucalyptus leaves are perfect for weddings, celebrations, anniversaries, parties, etc. The gold leaves stems are ideal choices for your home decor, suitable for fall harvest, Thanksgiving or Christmas parties
